mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_log_sms t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.sms_code like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.smsCode},'%')
AND t.platform like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.platform},'%')
AND t.mobile like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.mobile},'%')
AND t.params1 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params1},'%')
AND t.params2 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params2},'%')
AND t.params3 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params3},'%')
AND t.params4 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params4},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_date like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.createDate},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.type},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_log_sms t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.sms_code like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.smsCode},'%')
AND t.platform like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.platform},'%')
AND t.mobile like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.mobile},'%')
AND t.params1 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params1},'%')
AND t.params2 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params2},'%')
AND t.params3 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params3},'%')
AND t.params4 like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.params4},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_date like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.createDate},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{logSmsEntity.type},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_log_sms t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
